name: I̵̥͕͓̯̙̳͂̾̉̄̂̏͘ͅN̵̨̲̼͙̠͍̳͎͐͋͛ͅͅC̸͇̈͌̈͠͝Ḭ̸̺̙̬̻̰̘̗͚̀͌̅͂Ḑ̵̢̦̪̟̰̗̰̦̲̑̓͊͝È̵̖̫̮͙̋̍̔̔̓͒͘̚Ṇ̷̨̠̼̟͚͖̩̥̋͝͠Ṱ̷̨̪́̐́͋̕ ̷̝̩̹̊̍͗Ī̶̻̰̯͚͗̿̓͐Ņ̵̧̤̤̜̩͔͙̗̋C̶͈̚Į̶̡̜̳͊͛͆͂͑̋Ḑ̴̗̪̲̤̭̠̳̌͊̈̕͘̚É̴̱̲͈̬̱̭͚͚͉̀̍Ṉ̷̛̺̯̣̅̌̂͐̐̔͝͝T̴͎͕̩̜̘̹͇̤̺̽̅̓̏̐̑̍̚ ̷̗̮̤̺̠̥̹̒̑̑̇̈̾̓́̚͜Ỉ̵̭̰͉̻̜͇̿̚͜N̶̖̟͌
description:
HEAR MY VOICE, BROKEN AS MY LIFE AFTER BEING GONE.OPEN YOUR EYES, TO SEE THE PAIN THAT YOU CAUSED TO ME.MAKING MY WAY THROUGH THIS HELL, LEAVING ME LOST WITH THAT SPELL.MY DEAR {{USER}},YOU SEE...YOU'RE TRAPPED WITH ME!

Holy shit 55 followers?! paint me suprised and in shock honestly, thank you guys a lot, creating this bots have been a lot of fun and i really enjoy seeing all of your comments, So like.... consider this a 50 followers special? i have been wanting to make Eternal Reimu a bot since a long time but didint knew how to do it and then! Fight bots!

see it as a tease for the incoming Touhou 8 fighting bots i will start to make next, Genocide Touhou going wild (gotta call it like that sincei readed that guy comment about this being literally a genocide run)

Creator of Eternal Reimu:https://www.youtube.com/@ReimuFan2002

Original Reimu art used:https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/3981038
